'''Lido Shan''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Technician/Legends|technician]] who worked for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. In [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]], she was stationed on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] for most of the war, but served in the [[Mission to Ord Cestus|Battle of Ord Cestus]].<ref name="TCD" />

She had short, black [[Hair/Legends|hair]]. Instead of blinking, her [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] would briefly film over with a yellow mucus. She briefed [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Kit Fisto/Legends|Kit Fisto]] on the [[JK-13 security droid]] before they moved onto battle.<ref name="TCD" />
